examples: Then he saw a big man in a workman's cap and a mackinaw limping slowly toward him.
Then he saw a big man in a workman's cap and a mackinaw limping slowly toward him .
After Old Mackinac, a fort on the site of present-day Mackinaw City in northern Michigan.
One of the wealthiest men, John Jacob Astor, based his company, the American Fur Trading Company, in Mackinaw Island, Michigan.
